name: Chocolate Mint
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Prepare the pan(s) with cooking spray and flour.
In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In another mixing bowl, combine water, applesauce, peppermint extract, and whipped egg whites.
Divide the batter between prepared pans.
Bake until the top springs back when touched lightly, about 50 to 55 minutes depending on pan size.
